LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.description: An old, rusted fragment of a prototype reactor. It was likely abandoned when Moldaver's construction program was halted. It may still be possible to disassemble it and recover valuable fusion components.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientARCPart.label: ancient reactor part
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Basic.description: A prototype fusion core capable of generating large amounts of power from a geothermal foundation. It can later be upgraded into more advanced reactor variants once the correct research notes and hardware have been recovered. Must be placed on a steam geyser.
LanguageData.VQE_Genetron_Basic.label: prototype fusion core
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.description: A twisted chunk of reactor housing from one of Moldaver's abandoned projects. The valuable parts are gone, and everything else has degraded into scrap.
LanguageData.VQE_GenetronJunk.label: reactor junk
LanguageData.VQED_MilitaryCrateOfDeadlifeShells.descr: A rusted military crate filled with deadlife shells. These artillery rounds are packed with a dust-like compound that settles on nearby human and animal corpses after detonation and raises them as feral ghouls and ghoul-beasts. Many of the shells have lost their potency, but some may still work.
